name: Broiled Potato Skins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cheese (Montery Jack with Jalapeno Pepper)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick potatoes with fork to allow steam to escape.
2. Bake potatoes in a 425°F oven until tender, about 1 hour.
3. Cool slightly.
4. Cut each potato lengthwise into halves, scoop out insides, leaving a 3/8 inch shell.
5. Spread inside of shells with margarine or butter, sprinkle with salt.
6. Sprinkle each potato piece with cheese and bacon.
7. Set oven control to broil (550°F) or place about 5 inches from heat.
8. Broil potato pieces until cheese is melted, about 2 minutes.
9. Makes 48 appetizers.
